creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 249532
Patch for zstd

* Add CPE entry
* Switch to CMake as it compiles faster, removes the need of patching and cleans up Makefile overall
* Rearrange to follow Porters Handbook more closely and for readability
* Backport upstream PR 3994 [1]

1: https://github.com/facebook/zstd/pull/3994

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (aarch64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Tested with following consumers in 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
